description: Use when deciding where Claude should remember something (CLAUDE.md / skill / memory / project doc), writing or editing a CLAUDE.md file, authoring a custom skill, designing a skill's trigger description, choosing between skill / hook / CLAUDE.md for "always do X" behavior, or auditing a personal skill library for rot. Routes to chapters 12 and 13 (persistence) of claude-spine.

results.query: I want Claude to always run prettier on saved TS files in this project. Should that go in CLAUDE.md, a hook, or a skill?
audit my personal skill library — I haven't looked at it in 6 months. Some of these triggers can't be doing anything useful anymore.
I'm writing a custom skill for 'audit Supabase RLS from two sessions' — help me draft the trigger description so it actually fires when I need it
make my React state persistent across page reloads using localStorage
the form state is persisting between users — debug the session leak
explain how Redis persistence works — RDB vs AOF
I keep telling Claude 'never commit a .env file' in every session — where should that rule actually live so it sticks across all my projects?
the project CLAUDE.md has grown to 400 lines — most of it is stale and contradicts itself. How do I clean it up without losing the load-bearing parts?
design a Postgres schema for an audit log table — append-only
write a memoization helper for expensive React component renders
